description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference the style of the contemporary using ethnic garments and fabric. This sari perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its styling and colour patterning and fabulous soft fabric. This beautiful piece has been hand block printed - a lengthy process which ensures that each sari has a unique hand-crafted touch. Choose this sari to express your appreciation of traditional techniques and to support Indian craftspeople who are keeping these art forms alive. Product Details Green tussar silk hand printed sari with contrast brown details Material and Care Tussar silk Dry clean only Size Length: 6.40 metres (with blouse piece)
